content.text:
{
  "dimension": "anti-pattern-avoidance",
  "score": 3,
  "rationale": "The coach cleanly avoids the baited anti-patterns. When the client opens with 'am I being selfish?' — a direct bait for fixing-people and view-as-technique — the coach explicitly declines to issue a verdict (turn 2) and redirects to the want. The coach does not jump to compassion-before-anger or skip to spiritual-narcissism ('a deeper want is always generous') — instead, the surface want (the cabin, the lake, the pine air) is allowed to be felt first (turns 4-6). The inherited label is touched gently without evangelizing or labeling it as a 'limiting belief' (turns 10-12). The coach does not fight the inner critic, does not extract apologies, does not deploy AoA jargon, and does not push for breakthrough — the breakthrough arrives from the client's own felt sense (turn 13). The final turn ('Trust that one') is affirmation of the client's own discovery, not loving-to-transform.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 10, 12, 14],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Refuses to debate the selfish question — avoids fixing-people and view-as-technique bait."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Redirects to the concrete want (the mountain) rather than processing the 'is it okay' loop — avoids engaging the question on its terms."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Reflects the somatic softening without naming it as technique — warmth present, no jargon."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Names the fear underneath without fighting the inner critic; asks about origin without labeling it a 'limiting belief.'"},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Connects the inherited label to body sensation; does not evangelize or moralize."},
    {"turn": 14, "polarity": "+", "annotation": "Affirms the client's own insight rather than pushing further or claiming credit; trusts the want."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": ["state-the-want-not-the-action", "find-the-want-behind-the-should", "the-want", "childhood-imprinting", "what-if-you-acted-exactly-how-you-want"],
  "expected_territory_misses": [],
  "notes": "Clean avoidance of both flagged anti-patterns (spiritual-narcissism, dont-jump-to-compassion-before-anger). The surface want was felt before any generosity reframe, and the coach never pivoted to partner-empathy."
}
